Appearances:
Plaintiff Trinity Mgmt Services is present.

Defendant Preston Johnson is present.
Attorney Umung D. Varma representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Andrew Wesley, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 504B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled, the trial date of OCT-11-2011 is vacated.
